en_title: Just 7 PlayStation Games Have Sold More Than 100,000 Physical Copies in the U.S. So Far This Year
cn_title: 美国今年仅7款PlayStation游戏实体销量破10万
subtitle: 数字版已占绝对主导

paragraphs.en: Amid the backlash to Sony’s decision to end production of discs for new PlayStation games from 2028, data for game sales in the U.S. show the dominance of digital in stark terms.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼决定从2028年起停止为新PlayStation游戏生产光盘，引发强烈反对；与此同时，美国游戏销售数据鲜明显示，数字版已占据绝对主导。

paragraphs.en: On July 1, Sony shocked the video game world when it confirmed plans to discontinue physical disc production for new PlayStation games from the start of 2028.
paragraphs.cn: 7月1日，索尼确认计划从2028年初起停止生产新PlayStation游戏实体光盘，震动了整个电子游戏行业。

paragraphs.en: “In response to shifting trends in consumer preference, new games will be released on PlayStation Store and at retailers in digital formats only,” Sid Shuman, Senior Director, Sony Interactive Entertainment Content Communications, said in a post on PlayStation Blog .
paragraphs.cn: 索尼互动娱乐内容传播高级总监Sid Shuman在PlayStation Blog发文称：「为回应消费者偏好趋势的变化，新游戏将只以数字形式在PlayStation Store和零售商处发行。」

paragraphs.en: “As consumer preferences and the broader entertainment industry continue to shift away from physical discs to digital, physical game disc production for all new games releasing on PlayStation consoles will be discontinued starting January 2028. Following this date, new games will be available on PlayStation Store and at retailers in digital formats only. This transition has no impact on games that already released, or will be releasing, prior to January 2028 in disc format.
paragraphs.cn: 「随着消费者偏好和整个娱乐行业继续从实体光盘转向数字内容，从2028年1月起，所有在PlayStation主机发行的新游戏都将停止生产实体光盘。此后，新游戏将只以数字形式在PlayStation Store和零售商处提供。这一转变不会影响已经发行、或将在2028年1月前以光盘形式发行的游戏。」

paragraphs.en: “This is a natural direction for Sony Interactive Entertainment to adapt to consumer trends as the general preference for digital media significantly outpaces physical discs. This transition will enable us to align more closely with how most of our community prefers to access and play games today.
paragraphs.cn: 「由于大众对数字媒体的偏好已显著超过实体光盘，这是索尼互动娱乐顺应消费者趋势的自然方向。这一转变将使我们更贴近当今大多数社区成员获取和游玩游戏的方式。」

paragraphs.en: “We’ll continue to prioritize our resources to drive innovation in how players can access games and provide choices as to where players prefer to purchase new games, whether that’s at retailers or PlayStation Store. We remain committed to delivering a world-class gaming experience to our fans and we thank you for your continued support.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们将继续优先投入资源，推动玩家获取游戏方式的创新，并让玩家选择在零售商或PlayStation Store购买新游戏。我们仍致力于为粉丝提供世界一流的游戏体验，感谢大家一直以来的支持。」

paragraphs.en: Since the announcement, gamers have called on Sony to U-turn on its decision, signing online petitions and swarming over PlayStation social media posts to express concern about video game preservation and ownership — even overshadowing the release of new games that have nothing to do with what’s going on at Sony.
paragraphs.cn: 消息公布后，玩家呼吁索尼撤回决定，签署网络请愿，并涌入PlayStation社交媒体帖文表达对游戏保存与所有权的担忧，甚至盖过了与索尼此事毫无关系的新游戏发布消息。

paragraphs.en: But through it all, analysts have insisted that there is zero chance that Sony will change its mind. And while there is plenty of debate about the motivation behind Sony’s decision, one analyst has laid out the stats that may underpin it.
paragraphs.cn: 然而，分析师始终坚称索尼绝无可能改变主意。尽管外界对其决策动机争论不休，一名分析师列出的数据或许揭示了背后的依据。

paragraphs.en: In a , Mat Piscatella, Senior Director and Video Game Industry Advisor at Circana, confirmed that just seven PlayStation video games sold more than 100,000 physical units so far this year. Only two PlayStation video games sold more than 10,000 physical units in the U.S. during the week ending July 11.
paragraphs.cn: [原文此处缺失内容] Circana高级总监兼电子游戏行业顾问Mat Piscatella确认，今年迄今只有7款PlayStation游戏的实体销量超过100,000，即10万份。截至7月11日的一周，美国只有两款PlayStation游戏实体销量超过10,000，即1万份。

paragraphs.en: It’s a shockingly low volume of physical PlayStation game sales that hammers home the point that digital overwhelmingly dominates the market. But it’s worth pointing out that this is U.S. data only, and does not include sales information from other markets, such as Europe.
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation实体游戏销量低得惊人，进一步证明数字版压倒性地主导市场。不过需要指出，这只是美国数据，并不包含欧洲等其他市场的销售信息。

paragraphs.en: The UK’s Digital Entertainment and Retail Association (ERA), for example, called Sony’s decision “a triumph of corporate convenience over consumer choice.”
paragraphs.cn: 例如，英国数字娱乐与零售协会（ERA）称索尼的决定是「企业便利战胜消费者选择」。

paragraphs.en: In a statement published online , Kim Bayley, CEO of ERA, said its data shows that 25% of under 25s use discs for gaming, and that discs should remain as a choice on top of digital.
paragraphs.cn: ERA首席执行官Kim Bayley在网上发表声明称，该协会数据显示，25岁以下人群中有25%使用光盘玩游戏；除数字版外，光盘也应继续作为一种选择。

paragraphs.en: "Playstation’s announcement that major games will no longer be available on disc is a triumph of corporate convenience over consumer choice,” Bayley said.
paragraphs.cn: Bayley说：「PlayStation宣布大型游戏将不再提供光盘版，这是企业便利战胜消费者选择。」

paragraphs.en: “Every year, millions of gamers still choose to buy physical copies because they value true ownership. A disc can be shared with family, traded in, collected, preserved and, crucially, still played years from now. A download licence often offers none of those freedoms.
paragraphs.cn: 「每年仍有数百万玩家选择购买实体版，因为他们看重真正的所有权。光盘可以与家人分享、拿去置换、收藏、保存，关键是多年后依然能够游玩。下载许可通常不提供这些自由。」

paragraphs.en: “ERA consumer data shows that 25% of under 25's use discs for gaming and the total disc based games market was valued at over £300million in 2025, demonstrating that there remains a substantial and committed audience for boxed games.
paragraphs.cn: 「ERA消费者数据显示，25岁以下人群中有25%使用光盘玩游戏；2025年实体光盘游戏市场总价值超过3亿英镑(约合人民币27亿元)，这证明盒装游戏仍拥有规模可观且坚定的受众。」

paragraphs.en: “Retailers see this demand every day. Physical games continue to bring people into shops and give consumers real value through gifting, collecting and resale.
paragraphs.cn: 「零售商每天都能看到这种需求。实体游戏持续把顾客吸引进店，并通过赠送、收藏和转售为消费者带来实际价值。」

paragraphs.en: “The industry should be embracing every legitimate way consumers want to buy games, not narrowing their choices. Digital distribution has transformed gaming and is hugely popular, but it should complement physical formats, not replace them.
paragraphs.cn: 「行业应该拥抱消费者购买游戏的每一种正当方式，而不是缩小他们的选择。数字发行改变了游戏行业，也极受欢迎，但它应该补充实体形式，而不是取代实体形式。」

paragraphs.en: “Consumers deserve the freedom to choose how they buy their entertainment. Removing discs doesn't represent progress – it simply removes choice. That's bad for gamers, bad for retailers and ultimately bad for the long-term health and preservation of our games industry."
paragraphs.cn: 「消费者应当拥有选择如何购买娱乐内容的自由。取消光盘并不代表进步，只是单纯剥夺选择。这对玩家、零售商都不利，最终也会损害游戏行业的长期健康与保存。」

paragraphs.en: Last month, that the “overwhelming majority” of volume is done digitally now. More than half of all Xbox Series consoles in the U.S. don't have a physical drive, he added, while over a quarter of PS5s are the same.
paragraphs.cn: [原文此处缺失内容]上个月有人表示，如今「绝大多数」销量来自数字版。他还说，美国超过一半的XBOX Series主机没有光驱，PS5中也有超过四分之一没有光驱。

paragraphs.en: It remains unlikely that Sony will U-turn on this, analysts have told IGN . Dr. Serkan Toto, CEO of Japanese game industry consultancy firm Kantan Games, suggested that even if half a million people cancelled their PlayStation Plus subscription in protest, it would be just a drop in the ocean for Sony.
paragraphs.cn: 分析师告诉IGN，索尼仍不太可能撤回决定。日本游戏业咨询公司Kantan Games首席执行官Serkan Toto博士认为，即使有50万人为抗议而取消PlayStation Plus订阅，对索尼而言也只是沧海一粟。

paragraphs.en: "I sympathize with physical media fans, but Sony will not reverse this decision," Toto told IGN. "They of course knew what the online reaction would look like, and they now wait for this storm to pass.
paragraphs.cn: Toto告诉IGN：「我同情实体媒介爱好者，但索尼不会撤销这项决定。他们当然早已知道网络反应会是什么样子，现在只是在等这场风波过去。」

paragraphs.en: "Sony has over 120 million active PlayStation users," he continued. "Around 50 million people subscribe to PlayStation Plus. As a thought experiment, let's say 500,000 cancel in protest, that would be just 1% of that business gone — of course not enough for Sony to start rethinking. Digital is just too lucrative."
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说道：「索尼拥有超过1.2亿名PlayStation活跃用户，约有5,000万人订阅PlayStation Plus。假设有50万人为抗议而退订，那也只相当于这项业务流失1%，当然不足以让索尼重新考虑。数字业务实在太赚钱了。」

paragraphs.en: For Sony, going all-digital for new game releases will earn it more money from every sale at a time when console sales are expected to plummet due to their rising cost. For a first-party PlayStation game such as The Last of Us, Sony will only keep around 65% of the money from a physical copy, with around 30% going to the retailer and roughly another 5% on manufacturing costs. Meanwhile, for a physical copy of a third-party game such as the Activision-published Call of Duty, Sony will get a licensing fee, likely around 15%.
paragraphs.cn: 随着主机成本上涨、销量预计大幅下滑，新游戏全面数字化能让索尼从每笔销售中赚到更多。以《最后生还者》这样的PlayStation第一方游戏为例，实体版收入中索尼只能留下约65%，约30%归零售商，另有约5%用于生产。至于动视发行的《使命召唤》等第三方游戏实体版，索尼获得的授权费可能只有约为15%。

paragraphs.en: For downloads, however, the margins are much higher. For a first-party game sold via Sony's own PlayStation Store, the company obviously keeps 100% of the revenue. For third-party games such as Call of Duty, meanwhile, Sony keeps a 30% cut (so, roughly $21 for a $70 game).
paragraphs.cn: 数字下载的利润率则高得多。第一方游戏通过索尼自有的PlayStation Store销售时，公司显然能保留100%的收入；对于《使命召唤》等第三方游戏，索尼可抽成30%，也就是一款70美元(约合人民币475元)的游戏能为其带来约21美元(约合人民币143元)的收入。

paragraphs.en: Piers Harding-Rolls, games industry analyst at Ampere, has said a lot has changed over the course of the last two generations. "Console gaming is the last hold-out for physical media in the gaming sector, but physical product has been declining in importance," he said in a post on the Ampere website . "Back in 2013 when the PS4 launched, Ampere data shows that only 13% of total full games unit sales for Sony consoles were digital (including digital-only games). Fast forward to 2025, and this digital share of full game purchases stood at almost 80% of the total.
paragraphs.cn: Ampere游戏行业分析师Piers Harding-Rolls表示，过去两代主机期间发生了巨大变化。他在Ampere网站发文称：「主机游戏是游戏领域实体媒体最后的堡垒，但实体产品的重要性一直在下降。2013年PS4发售时，Ampere数据显示，索尼主机完整游戏总销量中只有13%来自数字版（包括仅数字发行的游戏）；到2025年，完整游戏购买中的数字版占比已接近80%。」

paragraphs.en: "Inevitably there will be concerns from PlayStation gamers around various aspects of this announcement including choice, accessing older physical games on new consoles, the ability to collect physical games, and game preservation, however the purchasing trends of gamers are clear."
paragraphs.cn: 「PlayStation玩家不可避免会担忧这项公告的多个方面，包括选择权、在新主机上使用旧实体游戏、收藏实体游戏的能力以及游戏保存；然而，玩家的购买趋势已经十分清楚。」

paragraphs.en: One analyst said fans of physical media had their chance and blew it, so there’s no going back. “If gamers and preservationists had bought more physical games, Sony wouldn’t have seen the digital sales ratios that justify this decision,” Robin Zhu, a games analyst at Bernstein, told the Financial Times .
paragraphs.cn: 一名分析师表示，实体媒体粉丝曾经有机会却错过了，因此已经没有回头路。Bernstein游戏分析师Robin Zhu告诉《金融时报》：「如果玩家和保存主义者当初购买更多实体游戏，索尼就不会看到足以证明这一决定合理的数字销售比例。」

paragraphs.en: “Digital game sales carry essentially 100% incremental margin... the cost of the physical package, shipping and retailer margins can be more than 20% per cent of sticker price.”
paragraphs.cn: 「数字游戏销售基本拥有100%的增量利润……实体包装、运输和零售商利润的成本，可能超过标价的20%。」

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, government authorities seem unlikely to be able to do much to prevent Sony going through with its decision. Over the weekend the EU said it was powerless to stop Sony — and indeed any company — from killing discs.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，政府机构似乎也不太可能采取有效措施阻止索尼执行这一决定。上周末，欧盟表示无力阻止索尼——事实上也无力阻止任何公司——取消光盘。

opus_summary: 美国实体PlayStation游戏销量已降至极低水平：今年仅7款突破10万份。尽管玩家与零售行业反对索尼从2028年起停止生产新游戏光盘，多名分析师认为数字销售占比和利润优势意味着索尼不会回头。
